decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: scattered — name, title, links placed around the viewport freely
hero_height: auto — natural content height, no forced height
nav_style: side dots — floating dot indicators on the side
hover_effects: moderate — scale, shadow change, color transitions
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: nav links have an animated underline effect on hover
